evidence.text: i have the opportunity to work on very hard problems i have the opportunity to work with very smart people i have the opportunity to work with incredible organizations i have the opportunity to develop incredible talent i have the opportunity and freedom to innovate and find smarter ways of getting things done

elite brand recognition mckinsey s name carries immense prestige globally it opens doors across industries finance tech policy startups top-tier learning environment you ll work with some of the smartest people in business and learn advanced problem-solving communication and leadership skills rapidly steep career acceleration after just 2 3 years mckinsey alumni often transition into high-impact roles in private equ...
- ample leadership opportunities - exposure to high impact work - great network of colleagues

1 career development exceptional early-career learning with exposure to diverse projects and highly skilled colleagues 2 feedback culture regular structured feedback that supports growth and improvement 3 people met wonderful colleagues and built strong relationships that have been a highlight of the experience 4 alumni network a lasting asset that provides long-term professional opportunities and connections
i valued the community and growth opportunity
competitive compensation very high quality healthcare benefits
good pay outstanding health insurance benefits
well run company very good pay benefits learning and networking opportunities and high work flexibility
great health insurance benefits and you can come across nice people ti work with
good benefits and insurance benefits

working at mckinsey offers numerous advantages making it an appealing career choice for many professionals firstly the opportunity for rapid career advancement and skill development is unparalleled with access to a vast network of experts and mentors across diverse industries mckinsey's collaborative culture fosters continuous learning and growth allowing employees to tackle complex challenges and drive impactful ch...
great health benefits lot of smart people around you and good work life balance compared to consultants
relatively better work life balance than integrative consultants
benefits work-life balance opportunities for growth advancement
work life balance is a pro as an internal employee good relationships with virtual colleagues growth opportunities throughout the firm so long as you are willing to move teams
an inclusive environment with supportive colleagues and good resources for learning and improving skills
the work environment is incredible and supportive

- lots of client exposure across industries - amazing sponsorship and support for geographic re-location - great learning programs to upskill for latest industry best-practices - amazing diversity of colleagues - lot's of fun events in the offices - year end breaks and lot's of ptos to enjoy and spend personal time

the breathe of topics i work on daily is remarkable i am constantly growing and learning in a world class environment with colleagues who look our for one another are super intelligent yet do not take themselves too seriously and no sharp elbows truly my colleagues keep me staying here the new gc cares deeply about the team and wants us to continue being well respected deliver exceptional service and avoid burnout
the people are genuinely social senior technical people are visionary and grow junior colleagues
-good company benefits -supportive environment
smart people job security lots of talent good exit ops
great culture very respectful of professional staff
inclusive environment for all employees

you're surrounded by very smart and ambitious people you're exposed to wide range of industries functions and senior leadership you're constantly learning and growing you get to form deep trust based relationship with clients brand name is reputable
a lot of work and a lot of the rest of your life doesn't get attention
low pay and long hours
don't really own something as you only work with a client for a short period of time constantly change teams which can be draining long hours
very demanding on your work hours cannot imagine having a family while on this job best make partner and then have kids
long hours stressful frequent travel
not always provide feedback for growth

kinda smart people not in a good way always finding a way to tell a bs story no work-life balance effective hourly pay rate is 50 hour which is pretty bad compared to other jobs that draw from the the same schools education
too much work no work life balance
no work life balance meetings can pop up out of nowhere
it will take a lot of hours from you not recommended for people who aim for a work life balance
constant work pressure leadership doesn't understand tech so someone in tech will almost always feel a second class citizen at the firm
- long hours - culture may not be to your liking - can be pigeonholed relatively quickly
not as good as being a ba
travel is exhausting second class analyst consulting environment is not at its best in 2024
not a great engineering culture career growth
up or out culture lots of favoritism not a place for introverts or people who don't like to politic
high-pressure environment lack of transparency politics toxic internal politics
long working hours and sometimes toxic team leaders
- unfair ratings at times - harsh feedback can be exposed to toxic culture transactional overly high pressure
wlb unengaged out of touch senior partner leadership does not stand for its values
organizational changes recently implemented did not account for lower level employees outside hires at manager levels do not know the work of those under them or how to provide support
wlb is not that good
working hours stress pressure a lot of travelling
- it is not a 9 to 5
people can be extremely selfish competitive long hours can be lonely because of the constantly changing teams
